title: The BlingWiibling Modpack
description: A Modpack made for The BlingWiibling SMP
body:
This is a Modpack created for The BlingWiibling SMP, It contains various performance mods, along wiht some quality of life tweaks for our players, Giving them an intriguing world to explore and make their own with various world generation mods and homebuilding mods.

**Performance/API:**
- Architectury API
- BadOptimizations
- Bobby
- Chunky
- Cloth Config API
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- CoroUtil
- Cristel Lib
- Cubes Without Borders
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Geckolib
- Iceberg
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Ksyxis
- Lithium
- ModernFix
- Noisium
- ObsidianUI
- Prism
- SmartBrainLib
- Sodium
- Structure Pool API
- TerraBlender
- Text Placeholder API
- Video Tape
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ESF] Entity Sound Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features

**Quality of Life:**
- AppleSkin
- Astrocraft
- Blur+
- Camera Utils
- Continuity
- Elytra Slot
- Iris Shaders
- Legendary Tooltips
- Mod Menu
- Model Gap Fix
- Mouse Tweaks
- Reese's Sodium Options
- RyoamicLights
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium Extra
- Visuality
- Wakes
- What Are They Up To (Watut)
- Zoomify
- e4mc

**World Gen:**
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Dungeons and Taverns Pillager Outpost Overhaul
- Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Overhaul
- Scorched
- Tectonic
- Towns and Towers
- Wilder Wild

**Mobs:**
- Distant Friends
- Duckling
- Fish of Thieves
- Friends & Foes (Fabric/Quilt)
- Friends & Foes - Flowery Mooblooms (Fabric)
- Mobs of Mythology
- Nyf's Spiders
- Snuffles (Fabric)

**Other Mods**
- Artifacts
- Arts & Crafts
- Beautify: Refabricated
- Camerapture
- Comforts
- Elytra Trims
- Excessive Building
- Trinkets
